data.content:
[implementation] TAXONOMY.md updated.

Changes:
- Added new `## Normalized events` section between `## Nouns` and
  `## Workflow States` (TAXONOMY.md:307+).
- Added `### \`result\` event` entry under it with the full contract
  (definition, per-transport sources with file:line citations, DOES
  authorize list, does NOT authorize list, anti-patterns to grep for).
- Rewrote `### Turn` (TAXONOMY.md:287) to reference the new section
  and drop the loose "one result out" wording. Marked the entry
  `<!-- human -->` so /taxonomize preserves it.

Citations verified at current line numbers:
- src/lib/agent-adapter-normalizers.ts:92, 117
- src/lib/opencode-event-translate.ts:264, 290
- src/lib/agent-session-runtime-events.ts:170, 193, 246
- src/lib/codex-jsonrpc-translate.ts:260
- src/lib/agent-session-runtime-events.ts:1-27 (cross-ref docstring)
- src/lib/terminal-manager-take-follow-up.ts (the DO NOT block is
  cited via the anti-patterns section).

Quality gates (in worktree epic-moore-b361a1, deps installed):
- bun run lint → clean
- bunx tsc --noEmit → clean
- bun run test → 3041 passed, 11 skipped, 42 todo (all 306 files green)
